zeroconf_confirm.title: Baby Buddy Discovered
zeroconf_confirm.description: A Baby Buddy instance was found at {host}:{port}. Enter your API key to complete setup.

data_description.host: The URL of your Baby Buddy instance (e.g. http://192.168.1.100)
data_description.port: The port Baby Buddy is running on
data_description.path: Optional URL path prefix (leave empty if not needed)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Baby Buddy

abort.already_configured: This Baby Buddy instance is already configured
abort.no_instance_id: Baby Buddy instance did not provide an instance ID

data_description.mqtt_enabled: Subscribe to Baby Buddy MQTT topics for real-time sensor updates. Requires MQTT to be configured in both Home Assistant and Baby Buddy.
data_description.mqtt_topic_prefix: The MQTT topic prefix configured in Baby Buddy (e.g. 'babybuddy' subscribes to 'babybuddy/#').
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the Baby Buddy REST API (seconds). When MQTT is enabled, polling still occurs at this interval as a safety net. You may want to increase this (e.g. 300) when using MQTT.

mqtt_discovery_conflict.title: Baby Buddy MQTT auto-discovery is still enabled
mqtt_discovery_conflict.description: The Baby Buddy integration cleaned up {count} MQTT auto-discovered entities that would have been duplicates. To prevent this from recurring, disable **Publish Home Assistant MQTT discovery configs** in your Baby Buddy settings under Configuration > Home Assistant.

confirm.title: Disable MQTT auto-discovery on Baby Buddy
confirm.description:
Baby Buddy is publishing MQTT discovery configs that create **duplicate entities** alongside this integration.

Check the box below and click **Submit** to let this integration disable the setting automatically via the Baby Buddy API.

Alternatively, leave it unchecked and click **Submit** to dismiss this — you can disable it manually in Baby Buddy under **Configuration > Home Assistant**.

data.confirm: Disable MQTT auto-discovery on Baby Buddy

abort.entry_not_loaded: The Baby Buddy integration is not loaded. Please reload it and try again.
abort.api_call_failed: Could not reach the Baby Buddy API. Either Baby Buddy is offline, or it needs to be updated to a version that supports this setting. You can disable the toggle manually in Baby Buddy under Configuration > Home Assistant.
abort.skipped_by_user: You can disable MQTT auto-discovery manually in Baby Buddy under Configuration > Home Assistant.

entry_not_loaded.message: The Baby Buddy integration is not loaded. Please check your configuration.

time_in_future.message: Time cannot be in the future.

timer_not_found.message: Timer not found or stopped. Timer must be active.
